new_cascade_issues.title: Loss of optical resolution requirement compliance
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the telescope tube will eliminate the primary imaging capability, violating the GSD ≤ 1.5m at nadir requirement.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal control system failure
new_cascade_issues.description: The thermal panel is removed, which will cause the optical bench temperature to exceed allowable ΔT limits across orbital cycles.

new_cascade_issues.title: Structural integrity compromised
new_cascade_issues.description: The removal of the optical subsystem will alter the structural balance and potentially reduce the first natural frequency below the required 80 Hz.

new_cascade_issues.title: Star tracker alignment issues
new_cascade_issues.description: Without the optical subsystem, the star tracker may lose its reference point for accurate pointing and attitude determination.

new_cascade_issues.title: Data processing pipeline invalidation
new_cascade_issues.description: The data processing algorithms will no longer have valid input from the optical subsystem, rendering them obsolete.
